'''Di'tai'ni''' was the home of the [[Tai'ni/Legends|Tai'ni]], as well as many non-Tai'ni resident workers. It was two systems away from the [[Both system]].

It was aligned with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and maintained a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] base for it.

{{Planet-stub}}
